name: Treemap
desc: TreeMap is a fully downloadable app that can run on mac, windows, and linux. That visualizeses all of your disk-space into charts and square board. It also let…
descFull: TreeMap is a fully downloadable app that can run on mac, windows, and linux. That visualizeses all of your disk-space into charts and square board. It also lets you delete unwanted files and opens files for you aswell.
